details: The agent correctly navigated to both URLs. For the first URL (httpbin.org/status/404), it reported the navigation error (net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE) due to the 404 status code. For the second URL (httpbin.org/html), it successfully navigated and reported the page title 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' along with the Moby Dick excerpt content. Both steps were completed correctly.
